PDF Mate Editor Privacy Policy

Effective Date: May 16, 2026

Welcome to PDF Mate Editor. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information. Please read this policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms, please do not access the application.

1

Information Collection and Use

Personal Data

We do not collect or store personally identifiable information (such as your name, address, or phone number) directly on our servers. Any data required for your account or purchases is processed securely through third-party platform providers (like Google Play).

Device Files and Documents

Local Processing
PDF Mate Editor is designed to process your files locally on your device. Your documents, PDFs, signatures, annotations, and converted images are handled entirely on your smartphone.

No Server Uploads
We do not upload, copy, store, or monitor your private documents or personal files on any external servers.

In-App Purchases and Billing Data

Secure Processing
The Application offers in-app purchases and subscriptions. All financial transactions, billing details, and payment processing are handled strictly and securely by the Google Play Store Billing Library. We do not collect, view, or store your credit card or financial data.

2

Third-Party Services

To provide essential app features, billing mechanisms, and platform stability, the Application utilizes trusted third-party services. These third parties may access your data only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

  • Google Play Services Used to support app functionality and user authentication. Google Privacy Policy →
  • Google Play Billing Used to process premium feature upgrades and subscriptions securely. Google Play Terms of Service →
3

Data Security

We prioritize the security of your information. Because our application processes your documents locally, the primary security of your files relies on your mobile device's native security.

Recommendation
We recommend keeping your device operating system updated and utilizing secure passwords or biometric locks to ensure maximum protection of your documents.

4

Children's Privacy

Our Application does not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13.

If we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we immediately delete this from our records. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

5

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Effective Date" at the top.

You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

Contact Us

If you have any questions, suggestions, or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please reach out to us:

Developer: EYAD APPS INC
eyadappsinc@gmail.com
